pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AI-T-012 (AI & ML/Task) excluded: edge_case: 0 core signals, 0 OOS signals, composite 0.410. Highest framework: DDaT at 0.410.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Exclude consistent with edge_case scope, AI & ML, composite 0.410. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge exclusion of AI & ML (composite 0.410)?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: AI & ML at ~60% market presence. ML training data context in ~60% of annotator job descriptions. Exclusion consistent with role scope.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Market evidence consistent. Final decision: exclude.
